ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument (e.g., BTC-USD) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument (e.g., Bitcoin-USD) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., cryptocurrency, stock) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the financial instrument */,
  "price_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is quoted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the instrument (e.g., active, delisted) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instrument's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., Coinbase, NASDAQ) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the exchange's official website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the exchange was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* CEO of the exchange */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* Total trading volume of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades for the instrument */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization at the time of the data point */,
  "volume_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the volume is quoted */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Price change since the previous data point */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Volume change since the previous data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., API, Manual Upload) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data synchronization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "permissions_json" TEXT /* JSON object containing detailed permissions for the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is a default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's access */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_aggregations" (
  "aggregation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregation */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "start_timestamp" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the aggregation period */,
  "end_timestamp" TEXT /* End timestamp of the aggregation period */,
  "avg_open" REAL /* Average opening price during the aggregation period */,
  "avg_high" REAL /* Average highest price during the aggregation period */,
  "avg_low" REAL /* Average lowest price during the aggregation period */,
  "avg_close" REAL /* Average closing price during the aggregation period */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* Total volume of trades during the aggregation period */,
  "median_open" REAL /* Median opening price during the aggregation period */,
  "median_high" REAL /* Median highest price during the aggregation period */,
  "median_low" REAL /* Median lowest price during the aggregation period */,
  "median_close" REAL /* Median closing price during the aggregation period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_aggregations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_transformations" (
  "transformation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data transformation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the transformation (e.g., Moving Average, Normalization) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transformation */,
  "transformation_script" TEXT /* Script or function used for the transformation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the transformation script */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transformation */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the transformation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transformation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_transformations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_transformations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transformed_data" (
  "transformed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transformed data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original data point */,
  "transformation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transformation applied */,
  "transformed_value" REAL /* Transformed value of the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transformed data point */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transformed data point */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the transformed data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transformed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transformed_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transformed_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transformed_data_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transformed_data_transformation_id FOREIGN KEY ("transformation_id") REFERENCES data_transformations ("transformation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the uploaded data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was uploaded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* Quality score of the uploaded data (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point associated with the error */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of the error (e.g., invalid data, missing value) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message describing the error */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the error occurred */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the error has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_errors_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_errors_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
